zh.lifeSummary: 當Nichola Home於1482年出生在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾時，她的父親Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton26歲，母親Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston13歲。她於1497年4月3日與Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1537年7月17日在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nichola Home于1482年出生在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾时，她的父亲Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton26岁，母亲Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston13岁。她于1497年4月3日与Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1537年7月17日在英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Home
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hume  .

English: habitational name from Home in Clifton on Teme or in Feckenham (Worcestershire) or from a minor place similarly named, a variant of Hamm (from Middle English ham(me), with rounding of the vowel before the nasal consonant to give hom(me)).

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Nichola
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Nichola Home was born in 1482, in Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton, was 26 and her mother, Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston, was 13. She married Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries on 3 April 1497, in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 17 July 1537, in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nichola Home est née en 1482, à Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries le 3 avril 1497, à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 juillet 1537, à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Sc: Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Nichola Home 1482 in Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton 26 und ihre Mutter Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston 13. Sie hat am 3. April 1497 in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. Juli 1537 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries il 3 aprile 1497, nel Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 luglio 1537, nel Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nichola Homeが1482年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander Home II Laird of Eglintonは26歳，母Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelstonは13歳であった。1497年4月3日にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスでAndrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herriesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1537年7月17日にイギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスで55歳で死去した。

ko.Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Sc: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 커kc드브라이트
ko.lifeSummary: Nichola Home(이)가 1482년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1497년 4월 3일 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에서 Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1537년 7월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nichola Home nasceu em 1482, em Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries em 3 de abril de 1497, em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de julho de 1537, em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Sc: кирккудбраит, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nichola Home родилась в 1482 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries 3 апреля 1497 г. в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 июля 1537 г. в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries el 3 de abril de 1497, en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de julio de 1537, en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
